title: Verify existing implementation of T22 test case
description: The T22 test case for `@kody taskify --ticket JIRA-123` already exists in kody-test-suite.md (lines 411-455). The test documents the --ticket flag verification including issue creation, Step 22.1 triggering via comment, verification commands checking for TICKET_ID mode and task.md/task.json containing JIRA-123 reference, and Step 22.2 cleanup via issue close. Labels (test-suite-temp, test-phase-1, complexity: low) and all verification commands are present. T22 is referenced as a post-check in T02 and T04 test sequences and appears in the Consolidated Test Index.
existing_patterns: .claude/commands/kody-test-suite.md lines 411-455: T22 section follows same structure as T01-T07 (issue creation, steps, verification, cleanup)
kody-test-suite.md lines 833-844: T22 appears in Consolidated Test Index table with standalone designation
kody-test-suite.md lines 174-183: T22 referenced in T02 verification (T12/T13)
kody-test-suite.md line 840: T22 referenced as post-check in T04
